benefits.description: Tendon nodule on hand at base of middle finger essentially disappeared after 3 weeks of KLOW use. Nodule had persisted for 1.5 years despite cortisone injection ~1 year prior.
Resolution of uncomfortable semi-painful nodule symptoms

protocol_notes: 3 weeks KLOW almost daily (a few days missed), ~2.2 mcg subq. User explicitly notes 'correlation is not causation' and acknowledges difficulty linking directly to KLOW due to possibility of natural resolution or delayed effect from cortisone shot administered ~1 year prior. Male age 42, active lifestyle. Tendon nodule had been present for 1.5 years, was connected to middle finger tendon (moved with tendon movement). Previous cortisone injection provided 1-2 months relief. Surgery was contemplated as next step.
